---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / terminal output

If applicable, paste any error messages or screenshots here.

```
(paste terminal output here)
```

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, Windows 10)
- **PowerShell version:** (run `$PSVersionTable.PSVersion`)
- **VS Code version:** (run `code --version`)
- **PAC CLI version:** (run `pac --version`, or "not installed")
- **Git version:** (run `git --version`)

## Additional context

Anything else that might help diagnose the issue.
